headline: Why FedEx Stock Is Falling Sharply After Earnings Beat Expectations
summary: Shares of shipper  FedEx  fell after the company beat expectations for fourth quarter earnings and revenue and sees continued revenue growth this year.  Shares fell 7.6% in premarket trading Wednesday to $293.12.  FedEx reported fourth quarter revenue of $25 billion and adjusted earnings of $6.31 a share.

headline: FactSet Research Likely To Report Higher Q3 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: FactSet (FDS) to release Q3 earnings on July 1. Analysts expect $4.45 EPS and $617.59M revenue. Stock fell 0.2% on Tuesday. Analyst ratings available.
